description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can of baked beans in tomato sauce, featuring a pull-tab lid on top. The can is wrapped in a bright orange label with white text, prominently displaying the product name 'Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce' and a photographic image of beans in sauce on the front. The label includes nutritional highlights such as 'Source of Fibre' and 'No Artificial Colours or Flavours', as well as a star rating and serving suggestions. On the back and sides, detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and manufacturer details are printed in smaller text. The can's surface is smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish reflecting light. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention on a supermarket shelf or in an urban food pantry.
description: A glossy, orange-labeled metal can of baked beans in tomato sauce with a pull-tab lid and detailed nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product name, photographic beans image, and key nutritional highlights on a bright orange label.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel, ingredients list, and manufacturer details in small white text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more nutritional data and partial product name, emphasizing the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the product name and part of the nutritional panel, with the pull-tab lid clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A green circular logo with a stylized white 'W' is visible on the upper left of the front label.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label clearly states 'Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce' and shows an image of beans in red sauce, indicating tomato flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information panel is visible on the side, listing energy, protein, fat, carbohydrates, fiber, sodium, and other details.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A star rating graphic and icons for 'Source of Fibre' and 'No Artificial Colours or Flavours' are present on the front label.
